summary: Base W7 — prescribed ~19 mpw (mileage bump from W6's ~17), polarized ~85% Z1, on the §2.A revised schedule (Hyp A Wed, midweek easy Thu). Mon DONE: Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157 (coolest steady-easy of the block), Vomero Plus, SI + Achilles clean — first non-reactive Achilles read since the Adj #34 flare. Held under the prescribed 40 per the mileage hold; hill strides HELD again (Adj #44; earliest debut now W9 Mon since W8 is a deload). FLAGS: (1) Achilles trending clean — if Wed AM is also clean, the calf 335 / soleus-progression holds release at Wed Hyp A (Adj #40/#42/#44). (2) Run-MHR retest folded into Tue's threshold (Adj #45) — capture peak HR off a max-effort finisher after the 3×8 T work; treat as a floor (fatigue may cap it). (3) Hold mileage while the Achilles fully settles. Calf 335 bump and soleus progression stay held until a clean AM (Adj #40/#42). Live load progressions waiting on green sessions: Incline BB +5 → 145 Wed (expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP; AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8 deload), lat pulldown → 150 Sat (Adj #35), DB lat → 27.5 Wed (Adj #29), cable crunch → 70 Wed (Adj #32); chest-supp row 85 reassess Sat under fresher conditions (Adj #36); tri pushdown 55 / preacher 55 holds persist (Adj #38/#39). Shoe: Vomero for long/easy, Zoom Fly 6 short tempo only while Achilles reactive (Adj #34). Run-MHR retest still owed W6–W8 (now W7). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E).

days.note: Logged — Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157, cadence 166, treadmill, Vomero Plus; SI + Achilles clean (first non-reactive Achilles read since the flare). First work set only (strides/recovery omitted per athlete). Held under the prescribed 40 (mileage hold). HILL STRIDES HELD again — earliest debut now W9 Mon (W8 deload); release calf/soleus holds if Achilles stays AM-clean (Adj #44).

days.session: Threshold 3×8 min @ T (90 s rec) + MHR retest finisher — run only
days.note: §4.C W7 Tue, longer reps (3×8 vs W6's 5×5). Hold 8:00/mi (locked T pace, Adj #26); anchor RPE/pace not HR (Adj #9). RUN-MHR RETEST FOLDED IN (Adj #45): after the 3×8 T work + ~3–5 min easy jog, finish with a max-HR effort — treadmill 1%, ~2–3 min progressive build, last 30–60 s flat-out — capture peak HR. Treat the peak as a FLOOR (end-of-session fatigue may cap it); if ≥195–205, recompute Z2/Z3 per Adj #9. Zoom Fly 6 OK for this short tempo if Achilles tolerates.

Incline BB +5 → 145 (Adj #27; expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8); DB lat raise → 27.5 (Adj #29); tri pushdown hold 55 until clean set 3 (Adj #38); preacher hold 55 (Adj #21/#30); cable crunch → 70 if set 3 ≥RIR 2 (Adj #32); soleus 60s, HOLD progression while Achilles reactive (Adj #34); rear-delt 125.
§4.C W7 Thu midweek recovery (revert to rest on yellow/red mornings, §11.C). Vomero, flat, honest Z1 floor — no creep. Hold mileage if Achilles still reactive.
§4.C W7 Fri. Flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 spm (Adj #25). Anchor pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9). Shoe per Achilles status (Vomero if easy-dominant).

days.session: Long Z1 60 min AM + Hyp B PM (≥6h gap)
days.note: §4.C W7 Sat long (60 min prescribed; trim if Achilles reactive). Hyp B bumps/holds: lat → 150 (Adj #35), chest-supp row 85 reassess under fresher conditions (Adj #36), cable lat capped 17.5 (Adj #37), tri 55 hold (Adj #38), preacher 55 hold (Adj #39), seated calf 325 — 335 bump HELD until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #40), soleus 60s owed/held progression (Adj #42), hanging SLR add load/progress (Adj #41).
Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. Achilles AM check if still reactive.
